title: Setting Up Processing
discoveryHint: Build ore processing machines to learn about setups.

sections.text: A basic ore processing line consists of a Macerator feeding into an Ore Washer, which feeds into either a Thermal Centrifuge or a Furnace. Use conveyors on machine output faces to chain them together.
For more byproducts, add a second Macerator after the Ore Washer to convert Purified Ore into Purified Dust, then centrifuge or electrolyze the results.
